name: forestrie-ietf-126-demo
description: Forestrie IETF 126 demo — Marp deck (slides/) + runnable terminal script (demo-script.sh)

scripts.build: node scripts/build-deck.mjs && marp dist/deck.md -o dist/index.html --html --allow-local-files --no-stdin --theme-set themes
scripts.pdf: node scripts/build-deck.mjs && marp dist/deck.md -o dist/deck.pdf --allow-local-files --no-stdin --theme-set themes
